methodology: Extraction of demographic identifiers and behavioral patterns from verbatim quotes

behavioral_patterns: Used to hit 250+, now struggling for 200
key_pain_points: Can't keep up with playing partners
SEGMENT_1_FRUSTRATED_SENIOR.emotional_profile: Nostalgic, accepting decline, seeking solutions to stay competitive
representative_quotes: P-243: it seems once I hit like 40 my distance took a hit, 45 a bigger hit and 50 a pretty damn big one
P-219: I long wistfully for the days when I could carry that fairway bunker at 250 yards
H-154: For a 70+ yr old, that's a real game changer
SEGMENT_1_FRUSTRATED_SENIOR.sf2_messaging_angle: Get back the distance you lost - without swinging harder
SEGMENT_1_FRUSTRATED_SENIOR.price_sensitivity: MEDIUM - Will pay for solutions that work

behavioral_patterns: Practice swing fine, real swing disaster
representative_quotes: P-046: mentally I am prepared to hit a bad shot before I even step up to the ball
V-109: I can easily feel a nice swing during my practice swings with the driver/woods but put me over a ball and well........disaster
P-044: My crazy slice only happens with my driver, 3 and 5 woods
SEGMENT_2_CONFIDENCE_COLLAPSED.sf2_messaging_angle: Step up to the tee with confidence again

behavioral_patterns: Slice has always been the problem
May have given up on fixing swing
representative_quotes: P-021: if I swing as hard as I can, I could probably send the ball 2 fairways to the right
P-236: I spend so much time researching online how to fix a slice...Nothing. Still was slicing every drive
P-041: Im almost to the point where I think I'll never be able to get rid of my slice
SEGMENT_3_SERIAL_SLICER.sf2_messaging_angle: Your slice isn't a swing problem - it's an equipment problem

key_pain_points: Already done fitting, still not satisfied
representative_quotes: RC-109: Most driver heads these days produce similar distance numbers. IMO, the right shaft is more important
ST-117: I got on trackman and found out what my issue was
SEGMENT_4_EQUIPMENT_OPTIMIZER.sf2_messaging_angle: The engineering your swing has been waiting for
SEGMENT_4_EQUIPMENT_OPTIMIZER.price_sensitivity: LOW - Will pay for proven performance

primary_target.rationale: Largest addressable market, direct SF2 benefit alignment, emotionally motivated

secondary_target.rationale: Significant market size, high disposable income, active equipment buyers

tertiary_target.rationale: Highly motivated, will pay any price, but smaller segment
